description_long: This is a compact dumbbell with a solid, straight handle connecting two hexagonal end caps. The entire object is coated in a dark, likely rubberized or enamel finish, giving it a sleek and uniform appearance. The handle appears smooth and cylindrical, without visible knurling or ergonomic shaping. The hexagonal end caps are flat on their faces, which helps prevent rolling when placed on the ground. Subtle markings are visible on the end caps, indicating the weight value. The dumbbell appears to be in excellent condition, with no visible signs of wear, scratches, or rust.
description: A small, dark-colored dumbbell with hexagonal end caps and a smooth, straight handle. Subtle weight markings are visible on the end caps.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the dumbbell, both hexagonal end caps, and the straight handle.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the hexagonal shape of the end cap and the cylindrical handle extending away.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with visible weight markings on the end caps.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite side, again showing the hexagonal end cap and handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, round cross-section, smooth surface, no visible knurling or ergonomic features.
attribute_end_cap_design: Hexagonal, flat-faced end caps with a dark, likely rubberized or enamel coating; subtle weight markings visible.
attribute_presence_of_weight_markings: Weight markings are visible on the end caps, printed or embossed, showing the value '5'.
attribute_condition: Appears new and unused, with no visible wear, scratches, or rust.
